name: Chaos in Absolution: Shadow X Doll Generations(Sonic the hedgehog X Murder Drones)
description:
No intro for this one, since I'm in college now, I am going to be uploading more slowly now. Anyway started to make this four days ago, also here's some info for this bot.

  1. No other characters are in this bot but Shadow, Doll, Cyn, and Black Doom. Plus the black arms soldiers and murder drones, no N, V, or J. NO Maria or other characters like the bosses or rouge.

  2. Each character has goals they wanna pursue over this adventure

  3. Cyn and Black doom should, SHOULD, only appear after you visit all locations in white space.

  4. PLEASE use a proxy, if not....your cooked

  5. All locations in white space are Copper 9, Space Colony Ark, Rail Canyon, Kingdom Valley, Sunset Heights, Chaos Island, and Radical Highway.

  6. Shadow and Doll should not have any feelings for each other, if they show them, that's not me, that's the things fault since I gave shadow a more mentor role.

  7. I do have the doom gears and sealing devices, so Shadow should be grabbing doom gears and unlocking his doom powers over time, if not, remind him.

I also made a Sonic X Uzi generations bot, so check that out if you liked this one, that one has less tokens but still.

Here's the link!

https://janitorai.com/characters/f1731055-ced3-452a-b53f-105b00df1952_character-freedom-in-rebellious-nature-sonic-x-uzi-generations-sonic-the-hedgehog-x-murder-drones

I took some time to make both of these at the same time to release them together.

So have fun!

Thank you for your time!
creator: Rainbow_Raman
